name: Armor of Agathys
description: A protective magical force surrounds you, manifesting as a spectral frost that covers you and your gear. You gain 5 temporary hit points for the duration. If a creature hits you with a melee attack while you have these hit points, the creature takes 5 cold damage.
effect: Gain 5 temporary HP; melee attackers who hit you while you have temp HP take 5 cold damage in return
notes: No concentration — exceptional for a 1-hour self-buff at L1
Retaliatory cold damage (5 flat) modeled via effect prose; retaliatory-damage-on-hit mechanic tracked in spell-mechanics-proposals.md
